repository_choice_reason: BENCHUIX candidate-only visual artifacts already live in aris-active-context under artifacts/benchuix/, including the 27B-27E visual sandbox static prototype lineage; this raw export is governance evidence and should not be mixed into the dirty Project_ARIS worktree.
known_gaps: buttons without functional handlers: Recusar, Adicionar bloqueio, Editar, Remover
drawers are fixed and not dynamic per selected record, including Ver conversa and Decidir opening the same content
ARIS logo and explicit ARIS visual identity are absent
duplicated values exist without real derivation, including daily estimate style figures
client-facing text still contains ARIS jargon that requires later copy review
standalone HTML export is not integrated with the existing visual_sandbox_static source pack
no real runtime, backend, agenda or operator action wiring exists
